proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_palbociclib have longer pfs_months than those not receiving it (positive effect on PFS).
Patients receiving treatment_tamoxifen have longer pfs_months than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab have longer pfs_months than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have longer pfs_months than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan have longer pfs_months than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have longer pfs_months than those not receiving it.

analyses.result_summary: Palbociclib mean PFS 5.41 vs 4.31 off (Welch t-test, p<1e-300).
Tamoxifen mean PFS 4.72 vs 4.68 off (Welch t-test p=0.077).
Trastuzumab mean PFS 4.64 vs 4.71 off (p=0.029, direction OPPOSITE of expected: shorter PFS on drug).
Olaparib mean PFS 4.66 vs 4.70 off (p=0.33, not significant).
Sacituzumab govitecan mean PFS 4.69 vs 4.69 off (p=0.85, no overall effect).
Pembrolizumab mean PFS 4.63 vs 4.70 off (p=0.018, slightly LOWER on drug, opposite direction).

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_palbociclib improves pfs_months specifically in er_positive patients (positive interaction; palbociclib is a CDK4/6 inhibitor that requires intact ER signaling).
treatment_tamoxifen improves pfs_months in er_positive patients but not in ER-negative patients (canonical biology of selective estrogen receptor modulators).

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib * er_positive + age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ki67_pct', data=df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Strong positive interaction: palbociclib:er_positive beta=+1.574, p<1e-300. Within ER+: +1.58 mo benefit; within ER-: -0.02 (NS).
Tamoxifen:ER+ interaction beta=-0.004, p=0.88. Within ER+ subgroup: tamoxifen mean PFS 4.88 vs 4.86 off (diff +0.02, p=0.45). No detectable benefit even in ER+.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_trastuzumab improves pfs_months specifically in her2_positive patients (positive interaction; trastuzumab targets HER2).
treatment_trastuzumab improves pfs_months in her2_amplification subgroup, the most stringent definition of HER2-driven disease.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_trastuzumab * her2_positive + adj_covars', data=df).fit(); subgroup ttests
analyses.result_summary: Trastuzumab:HER2+ interaction beta=+0.012, p=0.74. Within HER2+: trastuzumab mean PFS 4.25 vs 4.33 off (diff -0.08, p=0.15). NO benefit detected in HER2+.
Within her2_amplification+ (n=1467): trastuzumab mean PFS 4.73 vs 4.76 off (diff -0.02, p=0.89). Still no benefit.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_olaparib improves pfs_months specifically in BRCA1 or BRCA2 mutation carriers (PARP-trapping mechanism requires HR deficiency).

analyses.code: stats.ttest_ind among brca_any==1 subgroup (BRCA1 or BRCA2); smf.ols interaction model
analyses.result_summary: Within BRCA1/2 carriers (n=2499): olaparib mean PFS 4.93 vs 4.59 off (diff +0.35, unadjusted p=0.041). Adjusted interaction term beta=+0.022, p=0.81. Borderline univariate signal that does not survive multivariable adjustment.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan improves pfs_months specifically in her2_low patients (TROP2-targeting ADC active in HER2-low disease).
treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan improves pfs_months specifically in triple-negative (er_positive=0 & pr_positive=0 & her2_positive=0) patients.

analyses.result_summary: Sacituzumab:HER2-low interaction beta=+0.042, p=0.28. Within HER2-low: mean PFS 4.74 on vs 4.77 off (diff -0.03, p=0.64). No benefit.
Within TNBC (n=10496): sacituzumab mean PFS 4.23 vs 4.31 off (diff -0.09, p=0.22). No benefit.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_pembrolizumab improves pfs_months specifically in msi_high patients (canonical immunotherapy biomarker).
treatment_pembrolizumab improves pfs_months specifically in triple-negative (TNBC) patients (analogous to KEYNOTE-355 indication).

analyses.result_summary: Within MSI-H (n=498): pembrolizumab mean PFS 4.84 vs 4.70 off (diff +0.14, p=0.64). Adjusted interaction beta=+0.20, p=0.18. Effect direction is positive but not significant; small N.
Within TNBC: pembrolizumab mean PFS 4.37 vs 4.29 off (diff +0.07, p=0.22). No clear benefit.

proposed_hypotheses.text: stage_iv patients have shorter pfs_months than non-stage-IV patients (more advanced disease, worse prognosis).
has_brain_mets patients have shorter pfs_months than those without brain metastases.
Higher ecog_ps (poorer performance status) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative correlation).

analyses.result_summary: Stage IV mean PFS 3.62 vs 5.15 in non-stage-IV (diff -1.54 mo, p<1e-300). Strong negative effect.
Brain mets mean PFS 3.75 vs 4.80 (diff -1.05, p=1.5e-178). Strong negative effect.

analyses.code: stats.spearmanr(df.ecog_ps, df.pfs_months); group means by ECOG
analyses.result_summary: Spearman rho=-0.334, p<1e-300. ECOG 0: 5.64 mo; ECOG 1: 4.44 mo; ECOG 2: 3.29 mo. Monotonic worsening.

proposed_hypotheses.text: er_positive patients have longer pfs_months than ER-negative patients (favorable prognostic biomarker).
pr_positive patients have longer pfs_months than PR-negative patients.
her2_positive patients have shorter pfs_months than HER2-negative patients overall (more aggressive biology in this cohort, where targeted therapy benefit is not realized).
her2_low patients have longer pfs_months than HER2-not-low patients.

analyses.result_summary: ER+ mean PFS 4.86 vs ER- 4.30 (diff +0.57, p=3.7e-143). Strong favorable prognostic effect.
PR+ mean PFS 4.82 vs PR- 4.46 (diff +0.36, p=5.8e-59). Univariate effect; in multivariable model with ER, PR not significant (beta=+0.015, p=0.31).
HER2+ mean PFS 4.32 vs HER2- 4.78 (diff -0.46, p=6.1e-70). Adjusted beta -0.47.
HER2-low mean PFS 4.76 vs not 4.65 (diff +0.11, p=1e-6). Univariate only; adjusted beta=+0.002 (NS).

proposed_hypotheses.text: pik3ca_mutation is associated with shorter pfs_months overall (negative prognostic effect).
The negative effect of pik3ca_mutation on pfs_months is concentrated in er_positive patients (effect modification: PIK3CA-driven endocrine resistance is a luminal-disease phenomenon).

analyses.result_summary: PIK3CA-mut mean PFS 4.33 vs wt 4.89 (diff -0.56, p=6e-144). Adjusted beta -0.58 (p<1e-300).
Within ER+: PIK3CA-mut 4.34 vs wt 5.14 (diff -0.80, p=1.9e-192). Within ER-: PIK3CA-mut 4.30 vs wt 4.30 (diff +0.00, p=0.99). Effect entirely in ER+ subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_palbociclib benefit is abrogated by pik3ca_mutation (negative palbociclib x PIK3CA interaction; PI3K-pathway activation bypasses CDK4/6 blockade).

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib * pik3ca_mutation + adj', data=df).fit(); 4-way subgroup table
analyses.result_summary: Palbociclib:PIK3CA interaction beta=-1.678, p<1e-300. Subgroup table: ER+/PIK3CA-wt palbo +2.38 mo (p<1e-300); ER+/PIK3CA-mut palbo +0.04 mo (p=0.39); ER- palbo no benefit regardless of PIK3CA. Three-way interaction palbociclib:ER:PIK3CA beta=-2.40 (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_palbociclib benefit is greater in postmenopausal than premenopausal patients (most pivotal CDK4/6i trials enrolled postmenopausal women).

analyses.result_summary: Postmenopausal palbociclib +1.05 mo (p<1e-220); premenopausal palbociclib +1.18 mo (p<1e-180). Interaction beta=-0.031, p=0.18 (NOT significant). Benefit is similar in both menopausal groups in this dataset.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among ER+/PIK3CA-wt patients, treatment_palbociclib benefit on pfs_months persists in those with has_brain_mets (test whether CNS involvement attenuates the benefit).

analyses.code: stats.ttest within ER+/PIK3CA-wt strata by has_brain_mets
analyses.result_summary: ER+/PIK3CAwt/no brain mets: palbo +2.38 mo (p<1e-300). ER+/PIK3CAwt/brain mets: palbo +2.24 mo (p=3e-62). Benefit virtually identical.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age_years correlates with longer pfs_months (positive correlation in this cohort).

analyses.result_summary: Spearman rho=+0.726, p<1e-300. Decade means: 30s=0.55, 40s=1.51, 50s=3.04, 60s=4.65, 70s=6.31, 80s=7.99, 90s=9.92. Strikingly large monotonic positive relationship; multivariable beta=+0.176 mo per year (~2 mo per decade) holding stage/ECOG/biomarkers constant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher baseline albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (nutritional/inflammatory marker of better prognosis).
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months (cachexia indicator).
Higher ki67_pct is associated with shorter pfs_months (proliferation index, especially in HR+ disease).

analyses.result_summary: Spearman rho=+0.102, p=1.4e-115. Multivariable beta=+0.48 mo per g/dL.
Spearman rho=-0.116, p=4.8e-149. Multivariable beta=-0.077 mo per percent weight loss.

analyses.code: stats.spearmanr overall and stratified by ER
analyses.result_summary: Overall rho=-0.083, p=8e-77. Within ER+: rho=-0.116, p=1.5e-105. Within ER-: rho=-0.005 (NS). Effect concentrated in ER+ disease.

proposed_hypotheses.text: BRCA1 or BRCA2 mutation carriers have shorter pfs_months than non-carriers overall.

analyses.result_summary: BRCA1: mean 4.67 vs 4.69 (diff -0.02, p=0.72, NS). BRCA2: 4.57 vs 4.70 (diff -0.13, p=0.08, borderline). Adjusted beta for brca1 -0.07 (p=0.03), brca2 -0.04 (NS). No clinically meaningful main effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Triple-negative (er=0 & pr=0 & her2=0) patients have shorter pfs_months than non-TNBC patients.

analyses.result_summary: TNBC mean PFS 4.30 vs non-TNBC 4.80 (diff -0.49, p=9.7e-90). Confirms aggressive biology of TNBC.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Specific metastasis sites (liver_mets, bone_mets, adrenal_mets, contralateral_lung_mets, pleural_effusion, pericardial_effusion) are independently associated with pfs_months beyond stage_iv classification.

analyses.code: stats.ttest_ind for each site; stratified by stage_iv
analyses.result_summary: Liver mets diff +0.02 (p=0.55); bone mets +0.04 (p=0.17); adrenal -0.01 (p=0.86); contralateral_lung +0.05 (p=0.16); pleural -0.03 (p=0.28); pericardial +0.02 (p=0.72). None reach significance overall and within stage IV strata, mean PFS is essentially identical regardless of organ site. Stage IV alone captures the prognostic signal.

proposed_hypotheses.text: node_positive patients have shorter pfs_months than node-negative patients.

analyses.result_summary: Node+ 4.68 vs node- 4.70 (diff -0.02, p=0.29). No effect on PFS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Major comorbidities (heart_failure, chronic_kidney_disease, copd, diabetes_mellitus, hypertension, atrial_fibrillation, autoimmune_disease, interstitial_lung_disease_history) are associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: All p-values >0.20; none significant. Effect sizes <0.05 mo. Comorbidity burden does not affect PFS in this cohort.

proposed_hypotheses.text: PFS varies by race_ethnicity, insurance_type, or rural_residence (sociodemographic disparities).

analyses.result_summary: race_ethnicity means: white 4.68, asian 4.74, black 4.72, hispanic 4.71, other 4.76 (range 0.08 mo). insurance: medicare 4.69, private 4.68, medicaid 4.71, uninsured 4.73. rural 4.71 vs urban 4.69. No demographic disparities apparent.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Prior therapies (prior_chemotherapy, prior_radiation, prior_surgery, prior_immunotherapy, prior_targeted_therapy, prior_lines_of_therapy) are associated with shorter pfs_months (reflecting more refractory disease).

analyses.code: stats.ttest_ind for each binary; spearman for prior_lines
analyses.result_summary: prior_chemo +0.00 (p=0.94); prior_radiation +0.05 (p=0.06); prior_surgery +0.07 (p=0.005, slight positive); prior_immuno -0.00 (p=0.98); prior_targeted +0.01 (p=0.87); prior_lines rho=+0.005 (NS). No meaningful refractoriness signal.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The combination treatment_palbociclib + treatment_tamoxifen yields longer pfs_months than palbociclib alone in er_positive patients (additive endocrine + CDK4/6 inhibition).

analyses.result_summary: ER+ subgroup: neither 4.30 mo, tam_only 4.33, palbo_only 5.89, both 5.90. Combo gain over palbo monotherapy +0.01 mo. No additive benefit; palbo carries the entire effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: At least one of the genotyped SNPs (rs1045642, rs1065852, rs1799853, rs1800566, rs2228001, rs3813867, rs4244285, rs4986893, rs1801133, rs1800896, rs1800629, rs2228570, rs1801131, rs429358, rs7412, rs662, rs2298771, rs2032582, rs1128503, rs1800470, rs1799983, rs4880, rs1050828, rs4363657) is associated with pfs_months after adjusting for clinical covariates (FDR-controlled).

analyses.code: smf.ols per-SNP adjusted for clinical covariates and palbociclib; collect p-values across 24 tests
analyses.result_summary: All 24 SNP p-values >=0.02. Smallest: rs2228001 beta=-0.025, p=0.021 (would not survive Bonferroni 0.05/24=0.002). No SNP main effect on PFS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_palbociclib effect on pfs_months varies with age_years (test for age modification of CDK4/6 benefit).
Inflammatory markers (nlr, crp_mg_l) and tumor markers (ldh_u_l, cea_ng_ml, ca_125_u_ml) are associated with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Palbociclib:age interaction beta=-0.0016 mo per year of age (p=0.13). No meaningful age-dependent modulation.
NLR rho=+0.004 (NS); CRP rho=+0.003 (NS); LDH rho=-0.013 (p=0.005, tiny effect); CEA rho=-0.001 (NS); CA-125 rho=+0.006 (NS). Apart from a marginal LDH signal, no inflammatory or tumor-marker signal.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A fully-adjusted multivariable model confirms that the dominant determinants of pfs_months are (in order of magnitude): age_years (positive), stage_iv (negative), ecog_ps (negative), treatment_palbociclib in ER+/PIK3CA-wt (positive), has_brain_mets (negative), pik3ca_mutation in ER+ (negative), er_positive (positive), her2_positive (negative), albumin_g_dl (positive), weight_loss_pct_6mo (negative), ki67_pct (negative); other treatments (tamoxifen, trastuzumab, olaparib, sacituzumab, pembrolizumab) have no detectable PFS effect.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + her2_low + brca1_mutation + brca2_mutation + pik3ca_mutation + albumin_g_dl + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ki67_pct + postmenopausal + sex_female + treatment_tamoxifen + treatment_palbociclib + treatment_trastuzumab + treatment_olaparib + treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan + treatment_pembrolizumab', data=df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted betas (p): age +0.176/yr (p<1e-300); ecog_ps -1.17 (p<1e-300); stage_iv -1.55 (p<1e-300); brain_mets -0.98 (p<1e-300); er_positive +0.53 (p<1e-300); pik3ca -0.58 (p<1e-300); her2_positive -0.47 (p<1e-300); albumin +0.48/g/dL (p<1e-300); weight_loss -0.077/% (p<1e-300); ki67 -0.019/% (p<1e-300); palbociclib +1.10 (p<1e-300, with strong ER and PIK3CA modification); tamoxifen -0.008 (p=0.49, NS); trastuzumab -0.010 (p=0.45, NS); olaparib -0.026 (p=0.13, NS); sacituzumab +0.033 (p=0.052, borderline); pembrolizumab -0.020 (p=0.15, NS). Confirms model.
